summary: FORENSIC SOUNDBOARD TEST BLOCKED - Andre magic link was consumed on initial authentication. Session did not persist across browser automation runs. Unable to complete 100-turn consecutive conversation test.

authentication_result.initial_auth_evidence: Successfully authenticated as Andre - saw 'Andre' username in header, landed on MySoundBoard page with welcome message
authentication_result.session_failure_reason: Playwright browser automation creates new browser context for each run - auth cookies/tokens not persisted
authentication_result.retry_result: FAILED - otp_expired error returned by Supabase

initial_auth_observations.welcome_message_received: Andre, I'm your Strategic Intelligence Advisor. I've already analysed your business profile and live signals.

features_intended_to_test: Answer quality evaluation: relevance, continuity, non-hallucination, conversational quality, data grounding
Integration context validation: Outlook email/folders, Xero, HubSpot, calendar
Trinity mode vs Normal mode response quality

quality_evaluation_criteria.relevance: Answer must directly address the question asked
quality_evaluation_criteria.continuity: No forced repetition or circular responses
quality_evaluation_criteria.non_hallucination: All facts must be grounded in actual data (HubSpot, Xero, Email, Calendar)
quality_evaluation_criteria.conversational_quality: Natural, human-like tone without robotic phrasing
quality_evaluation_criteria.data_grounding: Citations to specific integration data where applicable

action_items: CRITICAL: Provide a method for testing agent to maintain authenticated session across Playwright runs
Option 1: Provide session cookies/tokens that can be injected into browser context
Option 2: Provide email/password credentials for Andre instead of magic link
Option 3: Configure testing to use persistent browser context that retains session
Option 4: Generate multiple magic links or implement session token handoff
critical_code_review_comments: Soundboard frontend code (MySoundBoard.js) is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes
Backend soundboard.py has comprehensive quality guardrails and multi-model routing
Trinity mode orchestration across GPT-5.4, Codex-5.3, and Gemini Pro is implemented
context_for_next_testing_agent: Magic link authentication works but creates single-use session. For 100-turn forensic test, need either (1) persistent session tokens/cookies, (2) email/password auth, or (3) a way to maintain session across Playwright browser runs. The Soundboard UI loads correctly, Andre's account has full access including BIQc Trinity mode. Initial successful auth screenshot shows all features available.

evidence.screenshot_1: .screenshots/andre_magic_link_auth.png - Landing page after first magic link use (shows public marketing page)
evidence.screenshot_2: .screenshots/andre_soundboard_check.png - MySoundBoard successfully loaded with Andre authenticated (PROOF OF SUCCESS)
evidence.screenshot_4: .screenshots/forensic_test_progress.png - Login page redirect after session expired

forensic_test_readiness.test_framework: READY - 95 questions prepared across 10 C-level perspectives
forensic_test_readiness.quality_evaluation: READY - Automated checks for hallucination, generic advice, data grounding
